ios_native_quality.description: iOS-specific configuration, security, and API usage quality
look_for: Missing or placeholder CFBundleIdentifier in Info.plist
ATS exceptions allowing insecure HTTP for non-localhost domains
Hardcoded API keys, AWS keys, or private keys in Swift source
try! and as! force unwrapping without error handling
Empty catch blocks silently swallowing errors
skip: Test source files where force unwrap may be acceptable
Generated code in build or DerivedData directories
Third-party code in Pods or Carthage directories

system_prompt_append: When reviewing Swift/iOS code, pay special attention to App Transport Security configuration, Info.plist completeness, deprecated UIKit APIs, and dependency lockfile hygiene.
